title: mentha × dumetorum subsp. ayassei
intro: Mentha × dumetorum subsp. ayassei, also known as Mentha ayassei, is a subspecies of hybrid mint plant, a cross between Mentha dumetorum and Mentha longifolia. It is primarily recognized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Mentha ayassei include alleviating digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Mentha ayassei is often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, ease nausea, and soothe sore throats.
